scripts.app:workspace: corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run app:install && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 list --recursive --depth -1
scripts.app:catalog: corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run scripts:build && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run catalog:validate && node --test ../../.github/scripts/validate-service-catalog.test.mjs ../../.github/scripts/detect-changed-services.test.mjs ../../.github/scripts/app-baseline-scripts.test.mjs
scripts.app:baseline: corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run app:workspace && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run app:catalog && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run app:test:contract && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run app:changed -- --all && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run app:static
scripts.app:test:browser: node -e "console.error('app:test:browser not implemented yet; implement the browser behavior baseline slice before enabling this command.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.dev: concurrently "corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run dev:frontend" "corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run dev:backend"
scripts.test: corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run test:frontend && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run test:backend
scripts.build: corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run build:frontend && corepack pnpm@11.8.0 run build:backend
